evidence.excerpt: Friday April 9th 2010 @ 6.15. Simon + Eve set off with Tonic ... We drove thru [?Sunshine] to the Walks Penrhos, Wales, on the way to the Brecons 8.05.
(preceding lines end the Brandon Hills outing; one-line non-trip note 'Saturday October 24th. Simon + Eve take Margaret & Helen out to tea.' sits between)

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page ends the prior Brandon Hills trip (continues from previous window) and a one-line home/tea non-trip note, then opens the April 2010 Wales/Brecons trip at the heading 'Friday April 9th 2010'.

boundaries.title_guess: Cotswolds: Pangolin Foundry, Folly Farm & Snowshill Manor

evidence.excerpt: Friday May 7th. 6.25 we left Westfield [?S] & drove to Moreton on the Marsh ... We ended up arriving too late (8.10) & slept in carpark.
Saturday May 8th ... breakfast at William's & Bryony's B&B in Lower Swell, Cotswolds ... Pangolin Foundry in Chalford.

boundaries.title_guess: Home note: Strawberry Tea with Margaret & Helen (23 May)

evidence.excerpt: We had lunch in the carpark. They drove back to London & we are going back to Birmingham.
23 May Sunday Traffic jams as we left [?Sham] at 1.30 to take Margaret & Helen out for a Strawberry Tea.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Top of page closes the Cotswolds trip ('going back to Birmingham'); the '23 May Sunday' heading begins a short local Strawberry-Tea outing, not a touring trip.

boundaries.title_guess: Shropshire/Wales: Ludlow, Stokesay, Elsich Barns, Elan Valley

evidence.excerpt: Friday June 11th. At 2.15. we left for Wales. Simon, Eve, Peter, Magda Lipinska. And Tonic. We drove to Ludlow ... Elstich Barns campsite.

boundaries.title_guess: Suffolk graduation party then Belgium (Thorpeness, Groenpark)

evidence.excerpt: Saturday July 4th Simon & Eve & Tonic went over to Trimpley ... Then we had tea in the van. (closes Wales trip; intervening short day notes)
Saturday July 17th. 10 Simon & Eve set off, dropping Tonic at [?Karsels]. We are driving to [?Thornesweathers] for Momiji's & Koroku's graduation party.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Page opens with the end of the Ludlow/Wales trip and short day-trip notes (Saturday July 4th Trimpley/Arley Arboretum), then the 'Saturday July 17th' heading begins the Suffolk-then-Belgium trip.

boundaries.title_guess: New notebook front-matter: Van Log cover + index (Book 4)

evidence.excerpt: Van Log Friday 14th October 2011 - October 2017. 86 Westfield G, Edgbaston, Birmingham B15 3J0.
1. Kidderminster 2 Brook House Farm 3 Wilsham House ... (handwritten index page, repeated on B_0179_R, continued B_0180)

boundaries.title_guess: Devon & Cornwall: Kidderminster, Wilsham, Barnstaple, Padstow, Eden Project

evidence.excerpt: Friday 14th October 2011 We set off, Simon, Eve + Tonic (13) to visit Grandma in the Shruberg at Kidderminster ... We set off for the farm.
we drove south to Wilsham House B + B ... Then we drove on past Lorna Doone's Farm to a nearby camp site, near Oare ... On to Barnstaple.
Wednesday October 19th We left the lovely campsite at 9.30 for home.
Friday April 27th 2012. Simon, Eve & Tinder (6 mo) set off at 6 for Barmouth area ... Craig Wen campsite LL39 1BQ.
so we headed for home. On the way we stopped at Wroxeter ... (closes the Barmouth trip)
June 9th 8.45. Simon, Eve & Tinder are off to Annette's birthday party ... evening concert at Wingfield church ... near Halesworth ... We slept on Annette's drive.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Top of page returns home from the Barmouth trip (via Wroxeter); the 'June 9th' heading begins the Suffolk birthday-party trip.

evidence.excerpt: 2.45. We head for home. A good week end. (closes the Suffolk trip)
About June 16th Simon & Eve & Tinder went on a day trip to Pershore. Simon bought a battery for the van. We wandered around Pershore ... The Abbey is beautiful.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Top of page ends the Suffolk weekend ('We head for home'); the 'About June 16th' heading is a separate single-day Pershore outing.

boundaries.title_guess: Italy: via Belgium, Germany (Ulm), Bolzano, Verona Opera & Lake Orta

evidence.excerpt: Sat. July 21st ... Simon + Eve set off at 4 pm for Italy. We called in at Chad ... We arrived in Stallisfield again, the same as last year.
Sunday July 22nd. ... Queues at Channel tunnel terminus ... It took ages to find the Belgican campsite ... St. Seveur.
We drove on through lovely grassy fields of Bavaria to Ellessee ... on to Bolsano ... Lake Garda comes in sight.

open_at_end: The July 2012 Italy trip starting B_0190_L is still in progress at B_0198 (at Domodossola/Lake Orta); it continues past this window.
notes: Window starts mid-trip: B_0169_L continues the Brandon Hills outing from the previous window (no clear departure cited here). B_0177_R is the Book 4 'Van Log' cover/title page; B_0178-B_0180 are handwritten index pages (B_0178_R and B_0179_R are two scans of the same index page); these are non-narrative front-matter, grouped under the single non_trip boundary at B_0177_R. Index-page mapping for the Book 4 narrative trips: Kidderminster/Cornwall trip = index pp.1-6; Barmouth = p.7; Suffolk/Pershore = p.9; Italy = pp.10-18. Earlier 2010 trips map onto the Book 3 index (Brecon/Crickhowell pp.24-25; Pangolin/Snowshill pp.25-26; Ludlow/Elan pp.27-29; Suffolk/Belgium pp.30-31).
